ul.li: Alignment: ColumnMetadata MUST be 64-byte aligned. Use alignas(64) in C++ or appropriate padding in Rust to prevent False Sharing with adjacent metadata during concurrent scans.
Data Types: All boundary values use IEEE 754 double-precision (f64).
Pointer Semantics: hist_ptr is an atomic pointer. Updates during ANALYZE use std::atomic::exchange to ensure thread-safe transition between old and new histogram buffers.

Access Pattern:
Load *histogram_ptr.
Perform binary search on boundary_array (O(log N)).
Use (val - boundary[i]) / (boundary[i+1] - boundary[i]) for selectivity estimation.
